name: skill-fetch
description: Search, discover, and install AI agent skills from 7 registries with quality scoring and cross-platform support
author: girofu

skills.name: skill-fetch
skills.description: Search, discover, and install AI agent skills from 7 registries (SkillsMP, GitHub, CCPM, ClawSkillHub, skills.sh, prompts.chat) with multi-variant search, quality scoring, pagination, and local/global installation.

commands.name: fetch-skill
commands.description: Search and install skills from multiple registries
